verses.latin_vulgate: Verbum Domini quod factum est ad Sophoniam, filium Chusi, filii Godoliæ, filii Amariæ, filii Ezeciæ, in diebus Josiæ, filii Amon, regis Judæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דְּבַר־יְהֹוָ֣ה ׀ אֲשֶׁ֣ר הָיָ֗ה אֶל־צְפַנְיָה֙ בֶּן־כּוּשִׁ֣י בֶן־גְּדַלְיָ֔ה בֶּן־אֲמַרְיָ֖ה בֶּן־חִזְקִיָּ֑ה בִּימֵ֛י יֹאשִׁיָּ֥הוּ בֶן־אָמ֖וֹן מֶ֥לֶךְ יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: The word of the Lord that came to Zephaniah the son of Chusi, the son of Godolias, the son of Amarias, the son of Ezechias, in the days of Josias, the son of Amon king of Juda.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä on Herran sana, joka tapahtui Zephanjalle Kusin pojalle, Gedalian pojalle, Amarian pojalle, Hiskian pojalle, Josian Amonin pojan, Juudan kuninkaan ajalla.
verses.king_james: The word of the Lord which came unto Zephaniah the son of Cushi, the son of Gedaliah, the son of Amariah, the son of Hizkiah, in the days of Josiah the son of Amon, king of Judah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Congregans congregabo omnia a facie terræ, dicit Dominus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָסֹ֨ף אָסֵ֜ף כֹּ֗ל מֵעַ֛ל פְּנֵ֥י הָאֲדָמָ֖ה נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Gathering, I will gather together all things from off the face of the land, saith the Lord:
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä tahdon kaikki maalta ottaa peräti pois, sanoo Herra.
verses.king_james: I will utterly consume all things from off the land, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: congregans hominem et pecus,  congregans volatilia cæli et pisces maris :  et ruinæ impiorum erunt,  et disperdam homines a facie terræ, dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָסֵ֨ף אָדָ֜ם וּבְהֵמָ֗ה אָסֵ֤ף עוֹף־הַשָּׁמַ֙יִם֙ וּדְגֵ֣י הַיָּ֔ם וְהַמַּכְשֵׁל֖וֹת אֶת־הָרְשָׁעִ֑ים וְהִכְרַתִּ֣י אֶת־הָאָדָ֗ם מֵעַ֛ל פְּנֵ֥י הָאֲדָמָ֖ה נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will gather man, and beast, I will gather the birds of the air, and the fishes of the sea: and the ungodly shall meet with ruin: and I will destroy men from off the face of the land, saith the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä tahdon ottaa pois ihmiset ja karjan, linnut taivaan alta ja kalat merestä otan minä pois, niin myös pahennuksen ja jumalattoman, ja minä tahdon ihmiset maan päältä hävittää, sanoo Herra.
verses.king_james: I will consume man and beast; I will consume the fowls of the heaven, and the fishes of the sea, and the stumblingblocks with the wicked; and I will cut off man from off the land, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et extendam manum meam super Judam  et super omnes habitantes Jerusalem :  et disperdam de loco hoc reliquias Baal,  et nomina ædituorum cum sacerdotibus ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָטִ֤יתִי יָדִי֙ עַל־יְהוּדָ֔ה וְעַ֖ל כׇּל־יוֹשְׁבֵ֣י יְרוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם וְהִכְרַתִּ֞י מִן־הַמָּק֤וֹם הַזֶּה֙ אֶת־שְׁאָ֣ר הַבַּ֔עַל אֶת־שֵׁ֥ם הַכְּמָרִ֖ים עִם־הַכֹּהֲנִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will stretch out my hand upon Juda, and upon all the inhabitants of Jerusalem: and I will destroy out of this place the remnant of Baal, and the names of the wardens of the temples with the priests:
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä ojennan minun käteni Juudan päälle ja kaikkein niiden päälle, jotka Jerusalemissa asuvat, ja hävitän Baalin jääneet, ja munkkien ja pappien nimen tästä paikasta;
verses.king_james: I will also stretch out mine hand upon Judah, and upon all the inhabitants of Jerusalem; and I will cut off the remnant of Baal from this place, and the name of the Chemarims with the priests;

verses.latin_vulgate: et eos qui adorant super tecta militiam cæli,  et adorant et jurant in Domino,  et jurant in Melchom ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־הַמִּשְׁתַּחֲוִ֥ים עַל־הַגַּגּ֖וֹת לִצְבָ֣א הַשָּׁמָ֑יִם וְאֶת־הַמִּֽשְׁתַּחֲוִים֙ הַנִּשְׁבָּעִ֣ים לַֽיהֹוָ֔ה וְהַנִּשְׁבָּעִ֖ים בְּמַלְכָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And them that worship the host of heaven upon the tops of houses, and them that adore, and swear by the Lord, and swear by Melchom.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ne, jotka kattoin päällä taivaan sotaväkeä kumartavat, ja jotka kumartavat ja vannovat Herran kautta, ja vannovat myös Molokinsa kautta;
verses.king_james: And them that worship the host of heaven upon the housetops; and them that worship and that swear by the Lord, and that swear by Malcham;

verses.latin_vulgate: et qui avertuntur de post tergum Domini,  et qui non quæsierunt Dominum,  nec investigaverunt eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־הַנְּסוֹגִ֖ים מֵאַחֲרֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה וַאֲשֶׁ֛ר לֹא־בִקְשׁ֥וּ אֶת־יְהֹוָ֖ה וְלֹ֥א דְרָשֻֽׁהוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And them that turn away from following after the Lord, and that have not sought the Lord, nor searched after him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ne, jotka Herrasta luopuvat, ja jotka ei Herraa ensinkään etsi, eikä häntä tottele.
verses.king_james: And them that are turned back from the Lord; and those that have not sought the Lord, nor enquired for him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Silete a facie Domini Dei,  quia juxta est dies Domini :  quia præparavit Dominus hostiam ;  sanctificavit vocatos suos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַ֕ס מִפְּנֵ֖י אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֑ה כִּ֤י קָרוֹב֙ י֣וֹם יְהֹוָ֔ה כִּֽי־הֵכִ֧ין יְהֹוָ֛ה זֶ֖בַח הִקְדִּ֥ישׁ קְרֻאָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: Be silent before the face of the Lord God: for the day of the Lord is near, for the Lord hath prepared a victim, he hath sanctified his guests.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaijetkaat Herran, Herran edessä; sillä Herran päivä on läsnä, ja Herra on teurasuhrin valmistanut, ja vieraansa siihen kutsunut.
verses.king_james: Hold thy peace at the presence of the Lord God: for the day of the Lord is at hand: for the Lord hath prepared a sacrifice, he hath bid his guests.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit : in die hostiæ Domini,  visitabo super principes,  et super filios regis,  et super omnes qui induti sunt veste peregrina ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֗ה בְּיוֹם֙ זֶ֣בַח יְהֹוָ֔ה וּפָקַדְתִּ֥י עַל־הַשָּׂרִ֖ים וְעַל־בְּנֵ֣י הַמֶּ֑לֶךְ וְעַ֥ל כׇּל־הַלֹּבְשִׁ֖ים מַלְבּ֥וּשׁ נׇכְרִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it shall come to pass in the day of the victim of the Lord, that I will visit upon the princes, and upon the king's sons, and upon all such as are clothed with strange apparel:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herran teurasuhrin päivänä on tapahtuva, että minä etsin päämiehiä ja kuninkaan lapsia, ja kaikkia, jotka outoja vaatteita kantavat.
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass in the day of the Lord’s sacrifice, that I will punish the princes, and the king’s children, and all such as are clothed with strange apparel.

verses.latin_vulgate: et visitabo super omnem qui arroganter ingreditur super limen in die illa,  qui complent domum Domini Dei sui iniquitate et dolo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּפָקַדְתִּ֗י עַ֧ל כׇּל־הַדּוֹלֵ֛ג עַל־הַמִּפְתָּ֖ן בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֑וּא הַֽמְמַלְאִ֛ים בֵּ֥ית אֲדֹנֵיהֶ֖ם חָמָ֥ס וּמִרְמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will visit in that day upon every one that entereth arrogantly over the threshold: them that fill the house of the Lord their God with iniquity and deceit.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä etsin myös niitä sillä ajalla, jotka hyppäävät kynnyksen ylitse, jotka herrainsa huoneet varkaudella ja petoksella täyttävät.
verses.king_james: In the same day also will I punish all those that leap on the threshold, which fill their masters’ houses with violence and deceit.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit in die illa, dicit Dominus,  vox clamoris a porta piscium,  et ululatus a Secunda,  et contritio magna a collibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָה֩ בַיּ֨וֹם הַה֜וּא נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֗ה ק֤וֹל צְעָקָה֙ מִשַּׁ֣עַר הַדָּגִ֔ים וִֽילָלָ֖ה מִן־הַמִּשְׁנֶ֑ה וְשֶׁ֥בֶר גָּד֖וֹל מֵהַגְּבָעֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And there shall be in that day, saith the Lord, the noise of a cry from the fish gate, and a howling from the Second, and a great destruction from the hills.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä ajalla, sanoo Herra, pitää huudon ääni kuuluman kalaportissa, ja ulvominen toisella puolella, ja suuri surkeus kukkuloilla.
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass in that day, saith the Lord, that there shall be the noise of a cry from the fish gate, and an howling from the second, and a great crashing from the hills.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ululate, habitatores Pilæ :  conticuit omnis populus Chanaan,  disperierunt omnes involuti argento.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֵילִ֖ילוּ יֹשְׁבֵ֣י הַמַּכְתֵּ֑שׁ כִּ֤י נִדְמָה֙ כׇּל־עַ֣ם כְּנַ֔עַן נִכְרְת֖וּ כׇּל־נְטִ֥ילֵי כָֽסֶף׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Howl, ye inhabitants of the Morter. All the people of Chanaan is hush, all are cut off that were wrapped up in silver.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ulvokaat te, jotka myllyssä asutte; sillä kaikki kaupitsia-kansa on hävitetty, ja kaikki, jotka rahaa kokoovat, ovat kadotetut.
verses.king_james: Howl, ye inhabitants of Maktesh, for all the merchant people are cut down; all they that bear silver are cut off.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit in tempore illo :  scrutabor Jerusalem in lucernis,  et visitabo super viros defixos in fæcibus suis,  qui dicunt in cordibus suis :  Non faciet bene Dominus, et non faciet male.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָה֙ בָּעֵ֣ת הַהִ֔יא אֲחַפֵּ֥שׂ אֶת־יְרוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם בַּנֵּר֑וֹת וּפָקַדְתִּ֣י עַל־הָאֲנָשִׁ֗ים הַקֹּֽפְאִים֙ עַל־שִׁמְרֵיהֶ֔ם הָאֹֽמְרִים֙ בִּלְבָבָ֔ם לֹא־יֵיטִ֥יב יְהֹוָ֖ה וְלֹ֥א יָרֵֽעַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it shall come to pass at that time, that I will search Jerusalem with lamps, and will visit upon the men that are settled on their lees: that say in their hearts: The Lord will not do good, nor will he do evil.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä ajalla tahdon minä Jerusalemin kynttilällä etsiä, ja etsiskellä niitä miehiä, jotka rahkansa päällä makaavat, ja sanovat sydämessänsä: ei Herra tee hyvästi eikä pahasti.
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass at that time, that I will search Jerusalem with candles, and punish the men that are settled on their lees: that say in their heart, The Lord will not do good, neither will he do evil.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit fortitudo eorum in direptionem,  et domus eorum in desertum :  et ædificabunt domos, et non habitabunt ;  et plantabunt vineas, et non bibent vinum earum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֤ה חֵילָם֙ לִמְשִׁסָּ֔ה וּבָתֵּיהֶ֖ם לִשְׁמָמָ֑ה וּבָנ֤וּ בָתִּים֙ וְלֹ֣א יֵשֵׁ֔בוּ וְנָטְע֣וּ כְרָמִ֔ים וְלֹ֥א יִשְׁתּ֖וּ אֶת־יֵינָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And their strength shall become a booty, and their houses as a desert: and they shall build houses, and shall not dwell in them: and they shall plant vineyards, and shall not drink the wine of them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja heidän tavaransa pitää raatelukseksi tuleman ja huoneensa autioksi; he rakentavat huonetta, ja ei saa niissä asua, ja istuttavat viinapuita, mutta ei he saa niistä viinaa juoda.
verses.king_james: Therefore their goods shall become a booty, and their houses a desolation: they shall also build houses, but not inhabit them; and they shall plant vineyards, but not drink the wine thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Juxta est dies Domini magnus :  juxta est, et velox nimis.  Vox diei Domini amara :  tribulabitur ibi fortis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קָר֤וֹב יוֹם־יְהֹוָה֙ הַגָּד֔וֹל קָר֖וֹב וּמַהֵ֣ר מְאֹ֑ד ק֚וֹל י֣וֹם יְהֹוָ֔ה מַ֥ר צֹרֵ֖חַ שָׁ֥ם גִּבּֽוֹר׃
verses.douay_rheims: The great day of the Lord is near, it is near and exceeding swift: the voice of the day of the Lord is bitter, the mighty man shall there meet with tribulation.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Herran suuri päivä on läsnä, se on läsnä sangen kiiruusti; kuin Herran päivän parku on tuleva, niin väkeväin pitää silloin haikiasti huutaman.
verses.king_james: The great day of the Lord is near, it is near, and hasteth greatly, even the voice of the day of the Lord: the mighty man shall cry there bitterly.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dies iræ dies illa,  dies tribulationis et angustiæ,  dies calamitatis et miseriæ,  dies tenebrarum et caliginis,  dies nebulæ et turbinis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: י֥וֹם עֶבְרָ֖ה הַיּ֣וֹם הַה֑וּא י֧וֹם צָרָ֣ה וּמְצוּקָ֗ה י֤וֹם שֹׁאָה֙ וּמְשׁוֹאָ֔ה י֥וֹם חֹ֙שֶׁךְ֙ וַאֲפֵלָ֔ה י֥וֹם עָנָ֖ן וַעֲרָפֶֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: That day is a day of wrath, a day of tribulation and distress, a day of calamity and misery, a day of darkness and obscurity, a day of clouds and whirlwinds,
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä se päivä on kauheuden päivä, vaivan ja ahdistuksen päivä, tuulen ja tuulispään päivä, pimeyden ja synkeyden päivä, pilven ja sumun päivä,
verses.king_james: That day is a day of wrath, a day of trouble and distress, a day of wasteness and desolation, a day of darkness and gloominess, a day of clouds and thick darkness,

verses.latin_vulgate: dies tubæ et clangoris super civitates munitas,  et super angulos excelsos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: י֥וֹם שׁוֹפָ֖ר וּתְרוּעָ֑ה עַ֚ל הֶעָרִ֣ים הַבְּצֻר֔וֹת וְעַ֖ל הַפִּנּ֥וֹת הַגְּבֹהֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: A day of the trumpet and alarm against the fenced cities, and against the high bulwarks.
verses.finnish_biblia: Basunan ja vaskitorven päivä, vahvoja kaupungeita ja korkeita linnoja vastaan.
verses.king_james: A day of the trumpet and alarm against the fenced cities, and against the high towers.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et tribulabo homines, et ambulabunt ut cæci,  quia Domino peccaverunt ;  et effundetur sanguis eorum sicut humus,  et corpora eorum sicut stercora.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַהֲצֵרֹ֣תִי לָאָדָ֗ם וְהָֽלְכוּ֙ כַּֽעִוְרִ֔ים כִּ֥י לַֽיהֹוָ֖ה חָטָ֑אוּ וְשֻׁפַּ֤ךְ דָּמָם֙ כֶּעָפָ֔ר וּלְחֻמָ֖ם כַּגְּלָלִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will distress men, and they shall walk like blind men, because they have sinned against the Lord: and their blood shall be poured out as earth, and their bodies as dung.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä tahdon ihmisille ahdistuksen tehdä, ja heidän pitää käymän niinkuin sokiat, että he ovat Herraa vastaan syntiä tehneet; heidän verensä pitää vuodatettaman, niinkuin tomu, ja heidän lihansa niinkuin loka.
verses.king_james: And I will bring distress upon men, that they shall walk like blind men, because they have sinned against the Lord: and their blood shall be poured out as dust, and their flesh as the dung.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et argentum eorum et aurum eorum non poterit liberare eos  in die iræ Domini :  in igne zeli ejus devorabitur omnis terra,  quia consummationem cum festinatione faciet  cunctis habitantibus terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּם־כַּסְפָּ֨ם גַּם־זְהָבָ֜ם לֹא־יוּכַ֣ל לְהַצִּילָ֗ם בְּיוֹם֙ עֶבְרַ֣ת יְהֹוָ֔ה וּבְאֵשׁ֙ קִנְאָת֔וֹ תֵּאָכֵ֖ל כׇּל־הָאָ֑רֶץ כִּֽי־כָלָ֤ה אַךְ־נִבְהָלָה֙ יַעֲשֶׂ֔ה אֵ֥ת כׇּל־יֹשְׁבֵ֖י הָאָֽרֶץ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Neither shall their silver and their gold be able to deliver them in the day of the wrath of the Lord: all the land shall be devoured by the fire of his jealousy: for he shall make even a speedy destruction of all them that dwell in the land.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei heidän hopiansa eikä kultansa pidä heitä sinä Herran vihan päivänä voiman auttaa, vaan koko maa pitää hänen kiivautensa tulelta kulutettaman; sillä hän tekee nopiasti lopun kaikkein kanssa, jotka maassa asuvat.
verses.king_james: Neither their silver nor their gold shall be able to deliver them in the day of the Lord’s wrath; but the whole land shall be devoured by the fire of his jealousy: for he shall make even a speedy riddance of all them that dwell in the land.
